sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Toyota Motor Corp. of Korea 'continues its good work' by delivering donations to Ajou Automobile University
feed.summary: Toyota Motor Corporation Korea delivered 80 million won in scholarships to Ajou Automobile University as part of its "T-TEP" industry-academic cooperation program. The initiative aims to foster future automotive industry professionals through education and practical experience, including motorsports and electrification programs. This year's scholarships will also fund Japanese training programs and internships, building on a cumulative donation of 240 million won over three years.

feed.title: Genelux (GNLX) Head of Regulatory sells 585 shares to cover RSU taxes
feed.summary: Genelux (GNLX) Head of Regulatory, Ralph Smalling, sold a total of 585 shares of common stock on March 24 and 25, 2026, at prices between $2.42 and $2.51 per share. These transactions were made to cover estimated taxes related to vesting restricted stock units. Following these sales, Smalling's direct holdings in GENELUX common stock amount to 68,073 shares.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G/A] FORWARD AIR CORP Amended Passive Investment Disclosure
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for Forward Air Corp, declaring zero beneficial ownership and 0% of the class. This change is attributed to an internal realignment within Vanguard on January 12, 2026, where certain subsidiaries now report their holdings separately. The amendment was signed by Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration, on March 26, 2026.

feed.title: Franklin Universal Trust (NYSE:FT) Short Interest Up 117.2% in March
feed.summary: Franklin Universal Trust (NYSE:FT) experienced a significant 117.2% increase in short interest in March, reaching 17,023 shares. This rise translates to a days-to-cover ratio of 0.4 days, indicating a very quick potential for short positions to be covered. The company also declared a monthly dividend of $0.0425 per share, offering an annualized yield of 6.4%, while its stock traded at $7.91 with below-average volume.

feed.title: Q4 Earnings Highs And Lows: Motorola Solutions (NYSE:MSI) Vs The Rest Of The Safety & Security Services Stocks
feed.summary: This article reviews the Q4 earnings performance of safety & security services stocks, highlighting Motorola Solutions (MSI) which exceeded expectations with strong revenue growth. It also identifies CoreCivic (CXW) as the top performer with the biggest analyst estimates beat and fastest revenue growth, while GEO Group (GEO) had a softer quarter despite revenue beats due to missing full-year guidance. The piece concludes by discussing broader market shifts, including a rotation from AI/crypto to safer havens driven by geopolitical risks.

feed.title: Raymond James downgrades Masimo stock rating on Danaher deal
feed.summary: Raymond James has downgraded Masimo Corp. (NASDAQ:MASI) stock rating from Outperform to Market Perform, anticipating that Danaher's acquisition of the company will close without competing bids. The firm expects the deal to finalize in Q2 or Q3 2026, with the current share price near the $180 offer making further upside less appealing. This decision follows Masimo's preliminary 2025 financial results showing 9% revenue growth and recent leadership changes at Clairity, a company co-founded by Masimo's founder, Joe Kiani.

feed.title: Waters Corp Stock: Analytical Instruments Leader Faces Growth Challenges Amid Sector Tailwinds
feed.summary: Waters Corp (NYSE:WAT), a leader in analytical workflow solutions, faces growth challenges despite tailwinds in the scientific instruments sector. The company specializes in liquid chromatography and mass spectrometry, serving pharmaceutical, biotech, and environmental testing markets. While institutional investors like Vanguard maintain positions, recent performance has been mixed, with modest share declines and analyst ratings leaning towards a "Moderate Buy."

feed.title: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. Sells 1,065 Shares of Costco Wholesale Corporation $COST
feed.summary: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. reduced its stake in Costco Wholesale Corporation by 4.4%, selling 1,065 shares and ending the quarter with 23,099 shares valued at approximately $19.9 million. Despite this, major institutions like Norges Bank and Amundi have increased their positions, pushing institutional ownership to about 68.48%. Costco slightly exceeded quarterly earnings estimates, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of around $1,039, though valuation remains high and membership growth poses a potential risk.

feed.title: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. Reduces Holdings in Brown & Brown, Inc. $BRO
feed.summary: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. drastically cut its stake in Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE:BRO) by 97.9% in the fourth quarter, selling over 312,000 shares and retaining a minimal holding. While some institutional investors increased their positions, overall analyst sentiment has softened, leading to a consensus "Hold" rating and reduced price targets for the financial services provider. Brown & Brown reported Q4 earnings that beat consensus estimates, with revenue increasing by 35.7% year-over-year.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: Lumexa Imaging Holdings, Inc. (LMRI), Adobe (ADBE) and Blaize Holdings (BZAI)

feed.title: Walmart Inc. $WMT Shares Acquired by Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc.

This makes Walmart its 14th largest holding, comprising approximately 2.0% of its portfolio. The article also notes Walmart's recent earnings beat, positive analyst sentiment, and concerns regarding insider selling and a legal investigation into pay practices.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. $GOOG Stock Holdings Lowered by Community Trust & Investment Co.
feed.summary: Community Trust & Investment Co. has reduced its holdings in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) by 2.0% in Q4, selling 7,582 shares and now owning 366,123 shares valued at $114.89 million. While several other institutional investors increased their stakes, insider selling by executives like John Kent Walker and Sundar Pichai has been notable. Despite this, Alphabet maintains a "Buy" consensus rating from analysts, though it faces near-term pressures from a recent legal verdict and chip-market volatility.

feed.title: Can CSG Systems Become A Billion Dollar Beacon In A Crowded Tech Market? Analyst Says Yes
feed.summary: RBC Capital Markets analyst Dan Bergstrom initiated coverage on CSG Systems International (CSGS) with an Outperform rating and a $61 price target. Bergstrom is optimistic about CSG's potential to grow its business to over $1.5 billion by CY25E through consistent organic growth, strategic M&As, and margin expansion. The analyst highlights CSG's emerging role as a partner for digitizing customer experiences and monetizing payment processes in higher-growth verticals.

feed.title: Czech National Bank Grows Stake in Seagate Technology Holdings PLC $STX
feed.summary: The Czech National Bank increased its stake in Seagate Technology Holdings PLC by 6.4% in the fourth quarter of 2025, holding 57,449 shares valued at $15.82 million. This move comes as several analysts have raised their price targets for Seagate, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average target of $447.35. Seagate also exceeded Q4 earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $3.11 and revenue of $2.83 billion, and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.74.

feed.title: T-Mobile Extends 5G Into Classrooms And Enterprise Security Use Cases
feed.summary: T-Mobile US has announced new collaborations that expand its 5G network into education and enterprise security. Partnering with McGraw Hill, T-Mobile will provide 5G-powered learning solutions for schools in underconnected areas, while a collaboration with Infobip will integrate T-Mobile's network APIs into enterprise platforms for enhanced corporate security and communications. These initiatives highlight T-Mobile's strategy to leverage its core network assets for new services beyond traditional mobile offerings.

feed.title: Assessing Amgen (AMGN) Valuation As Shares Show Mixed Short And Long Term Returns
feed.summary: Amgen (AMGN) has experienced mixed share returns, with gains over the past year but a recent monthly decline, prompting a re-evaluation of its stock against fundamental values. While one valuation narrative places fair value at $350.03, suggesting the stock is slightly overvalued, a Discounted Cash Flow model indicates a significant undervaluation at $655.34. The article highlights Amgen's strong late-stage pipeline and potential for future growth, balanced against risks like drug pricing reforms and biosimilar competition.

feed.title: Clear Trail Advisors LLC Invests $17.62 Million in JPMorgan Chase & Co. $JPM
feed.summary: Clear Trail Advisors LLC has acquired a new stake of 54,671 shares in JPMorgan Chase & Co., valued at approximately $17.62 million, making it the fund's sixth-largest holding. Despite significant insider selling over the past 90 days, analysts generally have a "Moderate Buy" rating on JPM with an average price target of $338.70. The company recently announced a quarterly dividend of $1.50 per share, representing an annualized yield of 2.1%.

feed.title: Equifax Credit Reporting Services: Core Engine of Consumer Financial Insights in North America
feed.summary: Equifax remains a critical component of North America's financial infrastructure, providing essential credit reporting and "Bonitätsprüfung" (creditworthiness evaluation) services. These services, which leverage AI and machine learning, are vital for lending decisions, processing vast datasets to minimize default risks for banks, retailers, and fintechs. The company continues to evolve its offerings with AI integrations and focuses on security, strategic partnerships, and global expansion while navigating regulatory scrutiny and competition.

feed.title: Costco Fuel And Kirkland Shifts Aim To Deepen Member Loyalty
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale is enhancing member loyalty through strategic shifts in its fuel and Kirkland Signature private label offerings. The company is opening its first standalone gas station, separate from a warehouse, and increasing domestic sourcing for Kirkland products to manage tariff costs. Additionally, Costco is launching a Kirkland-branded energy drink to offer a lower-priced alternative, all aimed at reinforcing its value proposition and membership model.

feed.title: S&P Global Inc. $SPGI Shares Sold by DAVENPORT & Co LLC
feed.summary: DAVENPORT & Co LLC decreased its stake in S&P Global Inc. by 18.3% during the fourth quarter of the prior fiscal year, selling 3,080 shares and now holding 13,787 shares valued at approximately $7.21 million. This comes as S&P Global slightly missed EPS estimates but beat revenue expectations for the last quarter and provided positive FY2026 EPS guidance. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Buy" rating with an average price target of $563.53, and the company recently increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Synopsys, Inc. $SNPS Position Boosted by DAVENPORT & Co LLC

Despite trading around $402 with a high P/E ratio of 62.4, the semiconductor company maintains a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $531.

feed.title: DAVENPORT & Co LLC Cuts Stock Position in Keysight Technologies Inc. $KEYS

feed.title: Gallagher Expands Wholesale Reach With S Philips Surety Deal And AJG Valuation
feed.summary: Gallagher's Risk Placement Services division has acquired S Philips Surety & Insurance Services, expanding its U.S. wholesale brokerage and programs business, particularly strengthening its presence in the surety and specialty insurance distribution segment. This acquisition of S Philips Surety & Insurance Services, which focuses on relationship-driven surety business tied to construction and infrastructure, aligns with the broader industry trend of large brokers adding specialist wholesalers to diversify product reach and deepen expertise. Investors are advised to monitor the integration's progress, the contribution of surety within wholesale revenues, and its impact on Gallagher's leverage and cash generation, especially given the company's current P/E ratio compared to the industry average.

feed.title: Flowserve Corporation Files 8-K Report: Company Details, Stock Information, and Executive Changes (March 26, 2026)
feed.summary: Flowserve Corporation (NYSE: FLS) has reported significant executive changes in its latest 8-K filing. Lamar Duhon, President of the Pumps Division, has resigned and will be succeeded by Matthew Klopfer. Additionally, Chief Accounting Officer Scott Vopni announced his retirement, prompting a search for his replacement, with CFO Amy Schwetz prepared to serve in the interim.

feed.title: Galapagos Publishes 2025 Annual Report and Announces Annual and Extraordinary Shareholders’ Meetings
feed.summary: Galapagos NV has published its 2025 annual report and announced that its Annual Shareholders’ Meeting (AGM) and an Extraordinary Shareholders' Meeting (EGM) will take place sequentially on April 28, 2026. The meetings will address director appointments, re-appointment of the statutory auditor, a proposed name change to Lakefront Biotherapeutics, share repurchase authorization, and renewal of capital increase authorization. Details for joining the meetings and accessing relevant documents are available on the company's website.

feed.title: Equinix Fabric: The Interconnected Platform Powering Digital Infrastructure for North American Businesses
feed.summary: Equinix Fabric provides a software-defined networking platform that significantly reduces latency and enables on-demand connections between enterprises, cloud providers, and service partners across Equinix's global data centers. This platform is crucial for hybrid IT strategies in North America, addressing growing demands from cloud adoption and AI by offering scalable and efficient interconnections. It drives recurring revenues for Equinix Inc. by enabling secure, private, and high-performance networks, fostering innovation in edge computing and 5G backhaul while minimizing data transfer costs and enhancing overall performance.

feed.title: Daymark Wealth Partners LLC Buys New Stake in First Trust Core Investment Grade ETF $FTCB
feed.summary: Daymark Wealth Partners LLC has acquired a new stake in the First Trust Core Investment Grade ETF (FTCB) during the fourth quarter, purchasing 41,566 shares valued at approximately $882,000. Several other institutional investors also made new investments in FTCB. The ETF, which invests in investment-grade fixed income securities, recently announced a monthly dividend of $0.09 per share with an ex-dividend date of February 20th.

feed.title: Gartner names Tenable the company to beat in AI exposure
feed.summary: Gartner has named Tenable as the "company to beat" in AI-powered exposure management, highlighting its strong asset and attack surface coverage, AI application, and vulnerability assessment reputation. Tenable's platform, Tenable One, offers unified visibility across various IT, cloud, identity, and external attack surfaces, and leverages AI for risk prioritization, making it a front-runner against competitors like Qualys and Microsoft. The company aims to provide a comprehensive exposure management solution that goes beyond traditional assessment to include continuous discovery, prioritization, validation, and response to reduce risk.

feed.title: Assenagon Asset Management Boosts CenterPoint Energy Holdings

The investment firm now owns 413,903 shares valued at approximately $15.9 million, indicating its positive outlook on the utility provider's value and growth potential. This move could signal similar sentiment among other institutional investors who monitor such ownership changes.

feed.title: The Travelers Companies Stock: A Cornerstone of Property-Casualty Insurance Stability for North Amer
feed.summary: The Travelers Companies (TRV) is presented as a strong and stable investment in the property-casualty insurance sector, especially for North American investors seeking reliable dividend payers. The article highlights Travelers' diversified business model across personal, business, and specialty lines, its disciplined underwriting, and robust financial health. It emphasizes the company's competitive edge, ability to navigate economic cycles, and appeal to income-focused investors due to its consistent dividend growth and capital return policies.

feed.title: Hankook Tire Receives Ford’s Prestigious ‘2025 QR ZERO AWARD’ for Quality Excellence
feed.summary: Hankook Tire has been honored with Ford's '2025 QR ZERO AWARD' for its exceptional quality performance, marked by zero quality rejections and warranty claims over the past year. This achievement highlights Hankook Tire's advanced quality management and product development capabilities, particularly from its Geumsan Plant which supplies original equipment tires for the Ford F-150. The company continues to strengthen its long-standing partnership with Ford, also supplying tires for electric vehicles like the Mustang Mach-E, and maintains a commitment to technological innovation and global quality excellence.

feed.title: Caterpillar Inc. Stock: Navigating Power Demand Growth and Segment Realignment in 2026
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. shares are trading near recent highs, driven by increasing power demand from data centers and a strategic segment realignment. The company reported robust 2025 sales of $67.589 billion and a record backlog of $51 billion, signaling continued demand. Despite strong performance, challenges include margin pressures and ongoing litigation, which investors should monitor along with Q1 2026 earnings for future guidance.
